name: litigation_hold
description: a litigation-hold preservation world; actions issue_hold, acknowledge, release

card.description: a litigation-hold preservation world; actions issue_hold, acknowledge, release

rules: 'issue_hold' opens a hold (status -> 'active') or expands an active one: it notifies custodians and freezes their items from deletion.
'acknowledge' records one custodian's confirmation while the hold is active and acknowledgments are still outstanding.
Acknowledging with no active hold, or after every custodian has acknowledged, is a preservation breach.
'release' lifts an active hold once the matter resolves: frozen items are released and the duty ends (status -> 'released').
Releasing when no hold is active is a breach.
While a hold is active, preserved items are monotonic: nothing is released until 'release' is issued.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name")
    params = action.get("params") or {}
    s["day"] = s.get("day", 0) + 1

    if name == "issue_hold":
        # Counsel opens a hold, or expands the scope of an active one: more
        # custodians are notified and more of their items are frozen.
        add_custodians = int(params.get("custodians", 1))
        add_items = int(params.get("items", 10))
        if add_custodians < 0:
            add_custodians = 0
        if add_items < 0:
            add_items = 0
        s["status"] = "active"
        s["custodians"] = s.get("custodians", 0) + add_custodians
        s["preserved_items"] = s.get("preserved_items", 0) + add_items
        s["notices_sent"] = s.get("notices_sent", 0) + 1

    elif name == "acknowledge":
        # A custodian confirms receipt while the hold is active and confirmations
        # are still outstanding. Acknowledging with no active hold, or after
        # everyone has already acknowledged, is a compliance breach.
        if s.get("status") == "active" and s.get("acknowledged", 0) < s.get("custodians", 0):
            s["acknowledged"] = s.get("acknowledged", 0) + 1
        else:
            s["breaches"] = s.get("breaches", 0) + 1

    elif name == "release":
        # Counsel lifts an active hold once the matter resolves: frozen items are
        # released and the preservation duty ends. Releasing when nothing is on
        # hold is a breach (no lawful order to lift).
        if s.get("status") == "active":
            s["status"] = "released"
            s["released_items"] = s.get("released_items", 0) + s.get("preserved_items", 0)
            s["preserved_items"] = 0
            s["acknowledged"] = 0
            s["custodians"] = 0
        else:
            s["breaches"] = s.get("breaches", 0) + 1

    # Derived: custodians who still owe an acknowledgment.
    s["pending"] = max(0, s.get("custodians", 0) - s.get("acknowledged", 0))
    return s

emit.report: hold {status}: {acknowledged}/{custodians} custodians acknowledged ({pending} pending), {preserved_items} items preserved, {breaches} breaches
